theme_archetype.reasoning: Explicitly requested by user: dark-first design, deep navy/slate tones, neon indigo/violet accents, glassmorphism. It avoids generic tech aesthetics by grounding the neon in deep cinematic void blacks.

rules.splash_wordmark: font-black text-5xl uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-transparent bg-clip-text bg-gradient-to-r from-indigo-500 to-violet-500 drop-shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(139,92,246,0.8)]

splash_screen.element: Typographic 'Campus Chat' wordmark only. No icon logo.
splash_screen.effects: Intense neon glow pulse animation on text.

login_screen.input: Large padded text input for UPES ID, subtle glass background, active border switches to #4F46E5 with glow.
login_screen.button: Full-width rounded-full button, solid #4F46E5 with shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(79,70,229,0.4)].

otp_screen.boxes: 6 independent square inputs. Default: border-white/10. Focus: border-[#8B5CF6] shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(139,92,246,0.6)] text-white text-2xl font-bold.
otp_screen.timer: Small monospace text 'Resend in 60s' in text-zinc-400.

top_bar.content: Displays user's auto-generated alias (e.g., 'You\'re: SilentFalcon42') with their assigned neon avatar.

bottom_tab_nav.style: Floating pill-shaped glass container above safe area bottom. background_glass + blur.
bottom_tab_nav.active_indicator: A glowing neon dot or underline beneath the active tab icon, icon color changes to #00F3FF or #4F46E5.

chat_feed.pinned_banner: Glass card at the top, border-indigo-500/30, subtle indigo tint background. Contains community rules/welcome.
chat_feed.online_count: Absolute positioned glowing green (#39FF14) dot + '243 online' in tiny text.
chat_feed.bubble_other: Background rgba(255,255,255,0.05), border 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1), border-bottom-left-radius: 4px. MUST show random neon colored avatar circle attached.
chat_feed.typing_indicator: Three animated bouncing dots '...' inside a small dark glass bubble.

friends_tab.list_item: Row with Avatar, Alias, Action buttons (Accept/Decline for requests, Chat icon for friends).
friends_tab.sliding_chat: 1-on-1 private chat opens via sliding panel from the right (React Navigation screen push transition).

motion_and_interactions.screen_transitions: Slide from right for private chats, fade for auth flow.
motion_and_interactions.micro_interactions: OTP boxes pulse on focus. Tab icons pop slightly on press.
motion_and_interactions.typing_animation: Sequential vertical bounce on the 3 dots.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure white text on #4F46E5 meets minimum 4.5:1 ratio. Muted text must not drop below #71717A against #05050A.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements, buttons, inputs, and list items MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='otp-input-1', data-testid='tab-friends'). React Native testID should map to this if needed, but data-testid is strictly required.

image_urls.description: Abstract dark purple and pink glowing waves. Use as an optional subtle background layer behind the Splash Screen wordmark if needed.
Nighttime university courtyard. Use at 5-10% opacity behind the deep navy login/OTP screens for subtle campus atmosphere.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build as a React Native Expo application using NativeWind or standard StyleSheet.
Do NOT use any chat bubble/graduation cap icon for the logo. Only use the typographic wordmark 'Campus Chat'.
Implement the 6-digit OTP UI with individual boxes that auto-focus to the next box upon entry.
The Dark Mode toggle should default to dark. Implement a React Context or similar theme provider.
Ensure the private 1-on-1 chat acts as a distinct screen pushing from the right, not just a modal overlay.
Use standard UI primitives (View, Text, TextInput, Pressable) with styles applying the defined colors and radii.
Strictly add data-testid to every Pressable, TextInput, and interactive View.
